title: Mini Ice Cube Tray with Lid and Bin, 56 Pcs Ice Cube Trays for Freezer, Ice Cube Mold, Ice Molds Spill-Resistant Removable Lid & Ice Scoop, Ice Mold for Whiskey Cocktail, Tea, Coffee -Blue
features: [Easy to Release] The Longzon ice cube trays for freezer have an innovative golden diagonal design, just place the frozen ice mold backwards on the ice storage box and use your hands to press lightly on both sides of the diagonal to release all the ice cubes in a second!
[Food Grade Material] The Longzon ice cube tray with lid, ice scoop and storage box are all made of food grade PP & PET material. Safe for human body and can be frozen and used time and time again.

[Large Capacity Storage Box & Save Space] longzon Stackable design ice trays, save space while allowing you to freeze 28 x 2 mini ice cubes at once. Large capacity ice storage box can store plenty of ice cubes that can satisfy the ice cube demand for family party.

[Easy to Clean] The longzon ice cube mold has a smooth polished surface with a non-stick surface that is easy to clean and safe to use in all freezers. Do not use a dishwasher to clean, just rinse with water before use. Easy to refill and reuse.

[Multi-Use & Gift Ice Scoop] Various usages, you can put fruits, soda, cocktails, whiskey, vodka, iced coffee and wine into the freezer, to create DIY ice cubes of your favorite by this mini ice cube tray with lid and bin!
description: Product Description Warm Tips: Fill with water and freeze for at least 12 hours. For best results, remove ice cubes promptly after freezing 12 hours. If frozen over 5 days, let sit at room temperature for 3 minutes, then press to release the ice easily. See More
